text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur is in the middle of an online match in
her usual game.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Auto-aim, no collision... Looks like a new
cheating tool is making the rounds again.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, screw this. There's no way to play until they
get it sorted out.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What a waste of time. I'm goin' to bed.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Just because they're cheating, it doesn't mean
they've gotten any smarter. If I just use the terrain
to my advantage and set a trap for them...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hah, if anything, this has made my mind sharper.
Just like in programming, you're free to use
whatever means you can to achieve your goal.
There are plenty of ways to go about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Air Shakur is honing her strategic planning
skills, she also has plenty of ideas that can be put
to use in her races.
